title: notobasis syriaca
intro: Notobasis syriaca, also known as Syrian Notobasis, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Notobasis syriaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and treat various infections. Notobasis syriaca is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or oil for topical application.
